title: Mathew Tonlagha Marks Golden Jubilee with Praise and Book Launch - FinancialEDGE
description: Mathew Tonlagha, Chairman of Maton Engineering Nigeria Limited, is set to celebrate his 50th birthday in style. A series of events have been planned to mark this milestone, kicking off with a birthday praise day on February 2, 2026, in Delta State, followed by a book unveiling and reception in Abuja on February 8, 2026.
html:
Mathew Tonlagha, Chairman of Maton Engineering Nigeria Limited, is set to celebrate his 50th birthday in style. A series of events have been planned to mark this milestone, kicking off with a birthday praise day on February 2, 2026, in Delta State, followed by a book unveiling and reception in Abuja on February 8, 2026.

 

Series of events have been planned as the Chairman of Maton Engineering Nigeria Limited, Mr. Mathew Tonlagha turns 50.

The various events will commence with a birthday praise day on February 2,2025 in warring followed by a book unveiling as well as reception in Abuja on February 8,2026.

The organisers stated that the praise event which is a significant moment of thanksgiving is to dedicate the golden milestone to God in gratitude for what is described as Grace upon Grace.

Theme of the event is “Grace upon Grace, it’s a day to praise God and give him thanks for all he has done”.

The praise event is scheduled to hold on Monday, February 2, 2026, at the Mieka Event Centre, located within Mosheshe Estate, Effurun, Delta State. The programme is expected to commence by 3:00 p.m. prompt.

According to the statement, the birthday praise day is designed as a solemn yet celebratory gathering, creating an atmosphere of worship, gratitude, and reflection. The event will feature renowned gospel artistes drawn from across the nation, who will lead sessions of praise and thanksgiving in honour of five decades of life marked by divine guidance, favour, and notable accomplishments in both personal life and enterprise.

The event train miges to Abuja on February 8 and will commence with the official public presentation of his new book.

The organisers noted that the celebration goes beyond a birthday ceremony, describing it as an opportunity to publicly acknowledge God’s faithfulness over the years. Family members, friends, professional associates, well-wishers, and members of the Christian community have been invited to participate in what is expected to be a spiritually uplifting experience.

The statement further emphasized that the programme will be characterised by heartfelt thanksgiving, worship, joy, and testimonies, reflecting a life sustained and shaped by grace over the years.

According to Tonlagha, “attaining the golden age of 50 is a significant personal and professional milestone for me, and the simultaneous unveiling of my book represents a defining highlight of my journey, capturing my experiences, reflections and contributions over the years”.

Attendees are encouraged to come expectant and ready to join in praise and thanksgiving.
